reasoning: The control AC-4(16) focuses on enforcing secure information flow between interconnected systems. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure network communication and data transfer. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules to control ingress traffic, TLS can be enforced for secure data transmission, and service meshes like Istio can enable mutual TLS (mTLS) for secure service-to-service communication.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | information transfers on interconnected systems [
